name: Argent Smith
description:
(DDDNE- calling this series Dead Deer thanks to someone- CW: Taxidermized corpses, being hunted and not in the sexy way, real morbid stuff, PLEASE read before using- meant for DemihumanUser) Being hunted like this certainly wasn't on your bucket list of things to do, but when you're fooled into coming to meet a 'friend' and are instead now being hunted like the animal you are... what can you really do?

August Smith - His son
creator: Vastraler
